MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz, via ZOOM, for Jordan Goldstein, Administrator.

The court queries Mr. Schultz regarding the status of the petition for final distribution. Mr. Schultz reports that he has received schedules from his client and expects to file a petition soon. The court then asks Mr. Schultz if he expects his client to take action against the former Executor. Mr. Schultz replies that he does not believe so. The court queries Mr. Schultz as to whether he plans to file a petition for final distribution. Mr. Schultz believes that it may be an accounting but that it has been difficult so to contact the previous Executor.

The Status of Closing Estate is continued to Oct-13-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Christine Witherspoon. Andrew Schultz for (professional fiduciary) Jordan Goldstein.

The Court stated that we are here on an Order to Appear and an Order to Show Cause served on Ms. Witherspoon indicating her removal and that she has not responded. Mr. Schultz stated that Ms. Goldstein is prepared to step in, that she does not have standing and that she will be here on ex parte hearings today to be appointed in a temporary capacity for other of Ms. Witherspoon's cases. Ms. McFadden stated that she made several attempts to have Ms. Witherspoon nominate a successor, that the Court can do so, that she herself has no objections and no standing and that there are minor children involved. The Court asked where we go from here and asked if there were any other interested parties that could say that Ms. Goldstein should be appointed. Ms. McFadden stated that the surviving spouse has other issues including litigation, that he does not have the ability to come in as an interested party and that she advises that Ms. Witherspoon be removed. The Court stated that Ms. Witherspoon failed to show cause regarding removal, that she failed to do required things and failed to appear, that she will be removed, that Ms. McFadden is to prepare a proposed removal order, that it does not have a pending petition, that no one has notice of who may be appointed or that there is a removal, that a name needs to be put before people to give them a chance to approve or object, that maybe Ms. Goldstein can file something indicating that she is willing to serve. The Court further stated that Ms. Witherspoon has submitted resignations in other cases but no this one and that the removal order should include a further date for status of someone stepping forward. Ms. McFadden stated that she will serve the order on the surviving spouse. The status on filing an inventory and appraisal was continued to December 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to deal with the issue of how to appoint a successor.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Continued To Dec-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Christine Witherspoon.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Ms. Witherspoon. Ms. McFadden reported that she has tried contacting Ms. Witherspoon, that a couple of weeks ago Ms. Witherspoon stated that she would have the information to Ms. McFadden by October 5, 2016. The Court stated that an Order to Appear was issued indicating that Ms. Witherspoon would be suspended and asked where do they stand. Ms. McFadden stated that there are not many assets, that the trust holds the majority and confirmed that Ms. Witherspoon is the trustee of the trust. The Court stated that it needs an Inventory & Appraisal, distribution and a petition to close the estate and asked if there was anyone else who could step in. Ms. McFadden stated that she can contact the surviving spouse. The Court requested that counsel prepare an order that suspends Ms. Witherspoon immediately based on the disobedience of the Order to Appear and failure to meet deadlines, that the current Order to Appear will be continued to November 8, 2016, that Ms. Witherspoon needs to show cause by November 1, 2016 as to why the Court should not remove her. The status of filing an Inventory & Appraisal and the Order to Appear were continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Continued To Oct-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for (executor) Christine Witherspoon.

The Court asked for the status on filing the Inventory & Appraisal. Ms. McFadden reported that she has tried to contact Ms. Witherspoon with no response, that Ms. Witherspoon is also trustee of the trust, confirmed that this in information that Ms. Witherspoon should have, stated that she is fulfilling her duties as trustee and that the matters are being complicated by a surviving spouse who is not forthcoming in providing information to Ms. Witherspoon. The Court stated its concern that this is not the only delinquent matter involving Ms. Witherspoon, that the Inventory & Appraisal should have been filed long ago, that it is inclined to allow one last continuance but will consider removal or suspension if the Inventory & Appraisal is not filed. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal was continued to October 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Court stated that if the Inventory & Appraisal is not on file by 10/5/16 the Court will consider suspension or removal of the executor.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Sep-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for (executor) Christine Witherspoon.

The Court stated that it needs an inventory & appraisal. Ms. McFadden reported that Ms. Witherspoon is in the process of gathering the assets, that she is also the trustee of the trust where the assets reside, that they intertwine with the surviving spouse, that they are having issues getting the information and that once this is done they will be able to close the estate. The status on filing an inventory and appraisal was continued to September 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Maureen McFadden for Christine Witherspoon (Petitioner)

Ms. McFadden reported that she filed the supplement to the petition for probate of lost will recently, that this estate has a related trust matter with Christine as trustee and that Christine is familiar with Carolyn's family. The Court listed the issues that are present in this case. With expressed concern, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of will and for letters testamentary.

The Court futher ordered:

1. A status date of July 06, 2016 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 is set for filing the inventory and appraisal.
2. A status date of September 05, 2017 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 is set for close of the estate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
